storyBeat: 國王擔心王冠 — 派人去查真假

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Long ago in the city of Syracuse, a clever man named Archimedes lived. Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講阿基米德的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在阿基米德的故事裡：
🔑 king = 國王
🔑 crown = 王冠
🔑 gold = 金子
🔑 water = 水

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 bath = 洗澡
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 shout = 叫
🔑 heavy = 重

questions.sentence: Which one is a crown?
questions.question: Which one is a crown?
questions.explanationZh: 王冠的英文是 crown 👑！故事裡國王的金王冠就是 crown——故事的核心！

questions.sentence: Which one shows a bath?
questions.question: Which one shows a bath?
questions.explanationZh: bath = 洗澡/浴缸 🛁！Archimedes 去洗澡時，在浴缸裡發現了解答——bath 是這個故事最重要的地方！

questions.sentence: The king held up the heavy gold crown.
questions.sentenceZh: 國王舉起沉重的金王冠。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a king lifting a shiny gold crown
a man running fast down a road
a boy jumping into a pool of water
an old woman sitting by a warm fire
optionsZh: 一位國王舉起閃亮的金王冠
一個人快速跑下一條路
一位老婆婆坐在溫暖的火爐旁
questions.explanationZh: crown = 王冠，heavy = 重，gold = 金——句子說國王舉起沉重的金王冠，圖中正是這個場景！

storyBeat: 面對謎題 — 不能切, 不能熔, 該怎麼測?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在阿基米德的故事裡：
🔑 weigh = 秤重
🔑 jump up = 跳起來
🔑 shout out = 大喊
🔑 gold crown = 金王冠

questions.sentence: Archimedes jumped out of the bath.
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德從浴缸裡跳出來。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'jump out of the bath'?
options: a man reading quietly at a desk
a boy sitting still in a big chair
a man leaping out of a bathtub
an old king resting on his throne
optionsZh: 一個人安靜地在書桌前讀書
一個男孩靜靜坐在大椅子上
一個男人從浴缸裡跳出來
一位老國王坐在王座上休息
questions.explanationZh: jump = 跳，bath = 浴缸——句子說 Archimedes 從浴缸裡跳出來！這就是他發現答案的那一刻。

questions.sentence: Which one shows someone shouting?
questions.question: Which one shows someone shouting?
questions.explanationZh: shout = 大喊 📢！Archimedes 發現答案時，大聲喊出「Eureka！」（找到了！）——那就是 shout。

questions.sentence: Yesterday, Archimedes ___ out of the bath and ran down the street.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 句子有「Yesterday」(昨天)——是昨天發生的事，所以「跳了出來」要說 jumped 喔。

questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 weigh = 秤重
🔑 jump = 跳
🔑 shout = 大喊
🔑 heavy = 重

storyBeat: 想了好幾天 — 朋友擔心, 他決定去洗澡

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 day = 天
🔑 desk = 桌子
🔑 tired = 累
🔑 bath = 洗澡
記好了，等一下就用到！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For days Archimedes sat at his desk and drew shapes on the floor.
questions.explanationZh: 好幾天，他就坐在桌前，拿手指在地上畫來畫去。那些圓圈和線條，是他腦袋裡的想法。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not eat much. He slept very little.
questions.question: What was Archimedes like during these days?
options: eating big meals all day long
playing games out in the garden
questions.explanationZh: 吃得少、睡得少——整個人都投進去了。「吃得少又睡得少」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他吃得很少，睡得很少。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friends knocked on his door, but he barely heard them.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes paying attention to people around him?
questions.explanationZh: 朋友來敲門，他幾乎沒聽見——眼睛和耳朵都在謎題那邊。他沒注意身邊，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友敲他的門，他幾乎沒聽見。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friends grew worried about him.
questions.explanationZh: 朋友看他這樣，擔心壞了。吃這麼少、睡這麼少，換誰都擔心呀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw his face go thin and his eyes grow dark.
questions.question: What did his friends notice about Archimedes?
options: a new red coat on him
his face was thin and tired
questions.explanationZh: 臉瘦了、眼神暗了——「臉瘦又疲倦」就是朋友看到的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友們看見他的臉越來越瘦，眼神越來越暗。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last, Archimedes put down his pen with a tired smile.
questions.explanationZh: 最後，他帶著一個疲憊的微笑放下筆。好像在說：「好啦，讓腦袋休息一下。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My mind needs a rest. I will take a warm bath," he said.
questions.question: What did Archimedes decide to do?
options: soak in hot water to clear his head
go back to the king with no answer
run a long race around the city
sell the gold crown at the market
optionsZh: 沒有答案就回去找國王
把金王冠拿去市場賣掉
questions.explanationZh: 「腦袋要休息一下，我去洗個熱水澡。」——「泡熱水讓腦袋清醒」就是他的決定。
questions.sentenceZh: 「腦子需要休息了，去泡個熱水澡吧。」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He left the crown on the table and walked to the bath house.
questions.explanationZh: 王冠留在桌上，他走向澡堂。謎題暫時先放著——他不知道接下來會發生什麼事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of break was Archimedes giving himself?
questions.question: What kind of break?
questions.explanationZh: 他說要去洗個熱水澡——那個 🛁 就是他要去的地方呀！
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德給自己的是哪一種休息？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He thought the puzzle would have to wait. But the bath had a surprise for him...
questions.explanationZh: 他以為謎題要等一等——沒想到，浴缸裡藏著一個大驚喜在等他……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For days Archimedes sat at his desk and drew shapes on the floor.
questions.question: What was Archimedes doing at his desk?
options: drawing pictures for a new book
writing a long letter to the king
trying to work out the problem
questions.explanationZh: 在地上畫圖案——那是他在腦袋裡思考謎題的方式，「嘗試想出解決辦法」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 好幾天，阿基米德坐在桌前，在地上畫各種形狀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not eat much. He slept very little.
questions.questionEn: Did Archimedes take good care of himself during those days?
questions.explanationZh: 吃得少、睡得少——完全沒有好好照顧自己，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他吃得很少，睡得很少。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 days = 幾天
🔑 tired = 疲倦
🔑 friend = 朋友
🔑 rest = 休息
記起來！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friends grew worried about him.
questions.question: Why were his friends worried?
options: refusing to talk to anyone at all
wasting all his gold on things
the crown had gone missing somewhere
eating very little and barely sleeping
questions.explanationZh: 吃少睡少、臉瘦眼暗——朋友擔心這些。「吃得少睡得少」就是根本原因。
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友們開始擔心他了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My mind ___ a rest. I will take a warm bath," he said.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
optionsZh: 需要（現在第三人稱單數）
questions.explanationZh: 「我的腦袋需要休息」——說 my mind 這一個東西，動詞後面要加 -s，所以用「needs」喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我的腦袋___休息了，去泡個熱水澡吧。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last, Archimedes put down his pen with a tired smile.
questions.questionEn: Had Archimedes been working very hard up to that point?
questions.explanationZh: 「tired smile」——笑容是疲憊的，說明他已經努力很久了，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 最後，他帶著疲倦的微笑，放下了筆。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He left the crown on the table and walked to the bath house.
questions.question: What does this action show about Archimedes?
options: bringing the crown back to the king
taking a short break from the problem
planning to melt the crown at the bath
giving up on the puzzle for good
optionsZh: 暫時離開問題休息一下
questions.explanationZh: 把王冠留在桌上，去洗澡——「暫時離開問題休息一下」就是這個動作的意義。
questions.sentenceZh: 他把王冠留在桌上，走向澡堂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Friends knocked at his door, but he barely heard them — deep in thought.
questions.question: Which best shows Archimedes?
options: 🤯 lost in a very hard problem
🍎 picking fruit from a tall tree
optionsZh: 陷在一個超難的問題裡
questions.explanationZh: 朋友敲門都聽不到——「陷在一個超難的問題裡」那個 🤯 最像他。
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友來敲門，他幾乎沒聽見——全心全意在想事情。

storyBeat: 進浴缸 — 水溢出來, 他看見了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 tub = 浴缸
🔑 water = 水
🔑 step in = 踏進
🔑 spill = 溢出
準備好了嗎？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The bath was full to the top with warm water.
questions.explanationZh: 浴缸裝滿溫水，水面就在缸口邊緣——滿到再多一點就會溢出來的那種。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes stepped in slowly, one foot at a time.
questions.question: How did Archimedes get into the tub?
questions.explanationZh: 他慢慢地踏進去，一腳、一腳——「慢慢小心地走進」就是答案。不急，不急。
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德慢慢踏進去，先踩一隻腳，再踩另一隻腳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: As he sat down, water spilled over the edge onto the floor.
questions.questionEn: Did the water level inside the tub stay the same?
questions.explanationZh: 他一坐下，水嘩啦一下就溢到地板上——水位當然變了，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一坐下去，水就從邊緣溢出來，灑到地上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the water on the floor with wide, bright eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 他瞪大那雙疲倦的眼睛，看著地板上的水。那表情，像是某個東西正要從心裡跳出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Most people would have called for a cloth to wipe it up.
questions.question: What did most people do when bath water spilled?
options: ask for a cloth to wipe it
pour more water in the tub
questions.explanationZh: 別人看到地板濕了，當然是叫人來拿布擦——「找布擦掉」就是普通人的反應。
questions.sentenceZh: 大多數人會拿條布把水擦掉就算了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Archimedes stopped, and his heart started to beat fast.
questions.explanationZh: 但 Archimedes 停下來了，心跳「咚咚咚」加快。他看到別人看不到的東西了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water on the floor looked just the size of his body in the tub.
questions.question: What did the spilled water match in size?
options: only the size of his hand
as much room as he took up
just the size of his head
questions.explanationZh: 溢出的水，大小剛好等於他身體在水裡佔的空間。「跟他佔的空間一樣多」——就是這個！
questions.sentenceZh: 地上那灘水，剛好和他泡在浴缸裡的身體一樣大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His tired eyes lit up. The puzzle in his head began to move.
questions.explanationZh: 疲倦的眼睛突然亮了——腦袋裡有什麼東西開始動了。快了，快了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Archimedes' face look in that moment?
questions.question: How did his face look?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛亮起來 + 謎題有動靜 → 「靈感亮了起來」！那個 💡 就是他的眼神。
questions.sentenceZh: 在那個瞬間，阿基米德的表情是什麼樣子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He sat very still in the water. Then, in one quick breath, the idea came...
questions.explanationZh: 他靜靜坐在水裡，然後——吸一口氣——點子來了……奶奶說，那一秒鐘，改變了整個科學史。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes stepped in slowly, one foot at a time.
questions.question: Why did he move so slowly?
options: he had hurt his foot outside
he was very angry at the king
the bath water was far too cold
the full tub would spill if rushed
optionsZh: 滿滿的浴缸太急會溢水
questions.explanationZh: 浴缸裝滿了水——踏進去動作太快水就會溢出。「浴缸滿了，太急水就會溢出來」最合理。
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德慢慢踏進去，先踩一隻腳，再踩另一隻腳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The bath was full to the top with warm water.
questions.questionEn: Was there room for more water in the tub before Archimedes got in?
questions.explanationZh: 「full to the top」——已經滿到頂了，沒有多餘空間了，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 浴缸裡裝滿了溫水，裝到最頂端。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 tub = 浴缸
🔑 step in = 踏進
🔑 spill = 溢出
🔑 floor = 地板
澡堂裡的字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Archimedes stopped, and his heart started to beat fast.
questions.question: What made his heart beat fast?
options: he noticed something important about the water
he heard a loud sound from the street
a spider was sitting on the tub
he saw the king come to the door
optionsZh: 他注意到水裡有什麼重要的事
questions.explanationZh: 他停下來、心跳加速——是因為他發現了水裡面有什麼重要的東西，「注意到水裡有什麼重要的事」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 但阿基米德停下來了，心跳「咚咚咚」加快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Most people would have ___ for a cloth to wipe it up.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
optionsZh: 叫（過去分詞，配 would have）
questions.explanationZh: 「would have + 過去分詞」是假設語氣完成式——「would have called」才對。
questions.sentenceZh: 大多數人會___人來拿布擦掉。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at the water on the floor with wide, bright eyes.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes surprised by what he saw?
questions.explanationZh: 「wide, bright eyes」——大眼睛睜圓、眼神發亮，這是被驚到的樣子，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他瞪大那雙疲倦的眼睛，看著地板上的水。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water on the floor looked just the size of his body in the tub.
questions.question: What did Archimedes begin to understand?
options: gold and silver weigh the same
warm water always stays in the tub
objects push out water equal to their size
he simply needed a bigger bath
optionsZh: 物體把和自身大小相等的水推出去
questions.explanationZh: 溢出的水大小 = 他身體佔的大小——「物體把和自身大小一樣的水推出去」就是他悟到的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 地上那灘水，剛好和他在浴缸裡的身體一樣大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His tired eyes lit up. The puzzle in his head began to move.
questions.question: What is about to happen?
options: 😢 he is going to feel sad
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛亮了、謎題開始動——「一個大點子快來了」那個 💡 最對！
questions.sentenceZh: 疲倦的眼睛突然亮了，腦袋裡的謎題開始移動了。

questions.sentence: Water spilled from the tub.
accept: Water spilled out of the tub.
The water spilled from the tub.
Water flowed out of the tub.
Water came out of the tub.
questions.explanationZh: spill = 溢出——浴缸裡的水太滿，一踩進去就嘩啦溢了出來。短短一句，故事的轉折點就從這裡開始！
questions.sentenceZh: 水從浴缸裡溢出來了。

questions.sentence: His heart beat fast.
accept: His heart started to beat fast.
His heart began to beat fast.
questions.explanationZh: beat fast = 跳得快——阿基米德看見地板上的水，腦袋裡有什麼東西剛剛動了，所以心跳「咚咚咚」加速！
questions.sentenceZh: 他的心跳得很快。

questions.sentence: He stopped and looked at the water.
questions.answer: He stopped and looked at the water.
accept: He stopped and stared at the water.
He stopped and looked at the water on the floor.
He paused and looked at the water.
He stopped to look at the water.
questions.explanationZh: stop = 停下來，look at = 看著——別人只想拿布擦掉，他卻停住了、盯著那灘水。就是這個停頓，改變了科學史！
questions.sentenceZh: 他停下來，看著地板上的水。

questions.sentence: Most people would have called for a cloth to wipe it up.
questions.question: What does this tell us about Archimedes?
options: he wanted a cleaner bath house
he asked a friend to help him
he saw what others would miss
he forgot the bath was still warm
optionsZh: 他想要一間更乾淨的澡堂
他看見了別人不會注意的事
他忘了洗澡水還是熱的
questions.explanationZh: 別人的反應是『擦掉就好了』，阿基米德卻停下來、睜大眼睛看——他注意到了別人都忽略的事呢。

storyBeat: 想通了! 跳出浴缸大喊 Eureka!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 idea = 點子
🔑 size = 大小
🔑 weight = 重量
🔑 shout = 大喊
這一節很精彩，記好字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The water that came out is the same size as my body in the tub!"
questions.explanationZh: 「溢出的水，大小剛好和我的身體一樣！」——他在浴缸裡就想通了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Now he knew. Gold and silver have different sizes for the same weight.
questions.question: What was the secret Archimedes found?
options: two things weigh the same but vary in size
gold and silver have the same size
silver always weighs more than gold
optionsZh: 相同重量可以有不同大小
questions.explanationZh: 金和銀，重量相同，但大小不一樣——「相同重量可以有不同大小」就是他發現的秘密。
questions.sentenceZh: 他明白了：同樣的重量，金和銀佔的空間不一樣大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw in his mind the crown going into a bowl of water.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes already planning a test?
questions.explanationZh: 他腦袋裡已經在演練：把王冠放進水裡，看水位……他已經開始計畫了，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 他腦子裡出現了畫面：把王冠放進一盆水裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could put the crown in water and watch the water rise.
questions.explanationZh: 把王冠放進水，水位會升高——升高多少，就能知道王冠有多大。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: If pure gold of the same weight pushed up less water, the crown was not pure.
questions.question: How could Archimedes tell if the crown was pure?
options: smell the metal of the crown
watch how the water level moved
check its color in the sun
listen to its sound when tapped
optionsZh: 聞一聞王冠金屬的味道
questions.explanationZh: 如果純金和王冠重量相同，水位卻升得不一樣——王冠就不是純金！祕密全在水位的變化裡喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 如果同重的純金排出的水比較少，王冠就不純。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A huge smile broke across his face.
questions.explanationZh: 一個大大的笑容開在他臉上——那種壓了好幾天的石頭終於滾走的感覺。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He felt the kind of happy you feel when a long question finally opens.
questions.question: How did Archimedes feel at this moment?
options: as quiet and sad as a rainy day
as sleepy and slow as a snail
as happy as solving a long puzzle
as cold and tired as the night
optionsZh: 像下雨天一樣安靜難過
像解開長久謎題一樣開心
questions.explanationZh: 「解開了一個好久的謎題」那種開心——「像解開長久謎題一樣開心」就是他的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 他感覺到那種快樂——一個很久的問題終於被打開了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He jumped out of the bath and called out, "Eureka! Eureka!"
questions.explanationZh: 他從浴缸跳出來，大喊「Eureka！Eureka！」——誰說洗澡不能有大發現？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In old Greek, "Eureka" means what?
questions.question: "Eureka" 的意思是什麼?
questions.explanationZh: 「Eureka！」是古希臘文——意思是「我找到了！」這是世界上最有名的一聲大喊。
questions.sentenceZh: 「Eureka」用古希臘文是什麼意思？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He ran to find the king, with his big idea ready to share...
questions.explanationZh: 他跑去找國王，心裡裝著大發現，腳步輕快得像在飛……奶奶說，這叫「帶著答案跑」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Now he knew. Gold and silver have different sizes for the same weight.
questions.question: What did Archimedes discover?
options: equal weight means different space taken up
gold is always heavier than silver
silver and gold look exactly the same
water can turn silver into gold
optionsZh: 相同重量佔不同的空間
銀和金看起來完全一樣
questions.explanationZh: 金和銀重量相同時，佔的空間不同——「相同重量佔不同的空間」就是他的發現。
questions.sentenceZh: 他明白了：同樣的重量，金和銀佔的空間不一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He jumped out of the bath and called out, "Eureka! Eureka!"
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes excited when the idea came to him?
questions.explanationZh: 跳出浴缸大喊——這是非常興奮的反應，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 他從浴缸裡跳出來，大喊：「Eureka！Eureka！」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 size = 大小
🔑 weight = 重量
🔑 jump out = 跳出
🔑 found it = 找到了
大發現節的字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could put the crown in water and watch the water rise.
questions.question: What was Archimedes planning to test?
options: how long the crown could stay under water
if the water level shifted with the crown in
whether hot water was heavier than cold
how to make the crown look brighter
optionsZh: 放進王冠後水位會不會移動
questions.explanationZh: 把王冠放進水，看水位升高多少——「放進王冠後水位會不會改變」就是他的測試計畫。
questions.sentenceZh: 他可以把王冠放進水裡，觀察水位升高。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He felt the kind of happy you feel when a long question finally ___.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
optionsZh: 打開（現在式，與整句時態一致）
questions.explanationZh: 這是描述一種「習慣性感覺」的子句——用現在式「opens」表達一般規律。
questions.sentenceZh: 他感受到那種快樂——一個很久的問題終於___的那種快樂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A huge smile broke across his face.
questions.questionEn: Was Archimedes happy at this moment?
questions.explanationZh: 「huge smile」——大大的笑容，當然是開心的，答 Yes！
questions.sentenceZh: 一個大大的笑容開在他臉上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He ran to find the king, with his big idea ready to share.
questions.question: What does this sentence show about Archimedes?
options: he first wanted to write the idea down
he was afraid to face the king
the idea was still not clear enough
he was eager to tell the king right away
optionsZh: 他迫不及待要馬上告訴國王
questions.explanationZh: 「ran to find the king」——他跑去找國王，「迫不及待要馬上告訴國王」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他跑去找國王，心裡裝著大發現，準備分享。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes jumped from the bath and ran, shouting "Eureka!"
questions.question: How did he feel in that moment?
options: 😔 sad the problem was still unsolved
questions.explanationZh: 跳出浴缸、大喊 Eureka！——「充滿喜悅和興奮」，那個 🎉 最像他！
questions.sentenceZh: 阿基米德從浴缸跳出，一邊跑一邊喊「Eureka！」

storyBeat: 把發現告訴國王 — 試驗王冠真假

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 palace = 皇宮
🔑 plan = 計畫
🔑 bowl = 碗
快記，故事要到高潮了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Archimedes ran to the palace with a big smile on his face.
questions.explanationZh: 他帶著滿臉大笑，一路跑到皇宮——奶奶說，這是她最喜歡的那種跑法：「帶著答案跑」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told the king his plan in clear, simple words.
questions.question: How did Archimedes explain his plan?
questions.explanationZh: 他用清楚又簡單的話，把計畫說給國王聽——「簡單清楚」就是答案，不拐彎抹角。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用清楚簡單的話，把計畫告訴了國王。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king leaned forward in his big chair to hear every word.
questions.questionEn: Was the king very interested in the plan?
questions.explanationZh: 國王身體往前傾，一個字也不想漏掉——這樣的人，當然是「很感興趣」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王身體向前傾，想聽清楚每一個字。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king brought a wide bowl of water to the room.
questions.explanationZh: 國王拿了一個大寬碗裝水，準備來做實驗了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Beside the crown they placed a piece of pure gold of the same weight.
questions.question: What did they put next to the crown?
options: a tall glass of warm milk
questions.explanationZh: 他們在王冠旁邊，放了一塊「重量一樣的純金」——這樣才能比出差別。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們在王冠旁邊放了一塊同樣重量的純金。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They put the crown in the bowl first. They marked the water line.
questions.explanationZh: 先放王冠進水，記下水面的位置——這是實驗的第一步。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then they put in the pure gold. The water rose to a lower mark.
questions.question: What did the water do for the pure gold?
questions.explanationZh: 放入純金，水位升得比較低——「停在比較低的位置」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 再放進純金，水位升得比較低。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two amounts of water were not the same. The crown was not pure gold.
questions.explanationZh: 兩次水位不一樣，代表……王冠不是純金！謎底揭曉了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the king feel about knowing the truth?
questions.question: How did the king feel?
questions.explanationZh: 國王終於知道真相了。那種「謝謝你把我心裡的石頭拿走」的感謝 → 「感謝得到答案」。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王知道真相後是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king turned to Archimedes and held out his hand with a soft smile...
questions.explanationZh: 國王轉向 Archimedes，溫和地伸出手……奶奶說，這個動作比任何話都有份量。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told the king his plan in clear, simple words.
questions.question: How did Archimedes communicate his plan?
options: only by drawing shapes on paper
in short words everyone could follow
in very long sentences with big words
questions.explanationZh: 「clear, simple words」——清楚簡單，「用大家都能懂的短話」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 他用清楚簡單的話，把計畫告訴了國王。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then they put in the pure gold. The water rose to a lower mark.
questions.questionEn: Did the pure gold push up more water than the crown?
questions.explanationZh: 純金放入後水位升得比較低——比王冠推出的水少，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 再放進純金，水位升得比較低。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 palace = 皇宮
🔑 plan = 計畫
🔑 bowl = 碗
🔑 water line = 水線
測試節的字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The two amounts of water were not the same. The crown was not pure gold.
questions.question: What did the water test prove?
options: water and silver weigh the same
the crown was made of pure gold
the crown had other metal mixed in
the bowl was the wrong size
questions.explanationZh: 水位不一樣高，代表王冠不是純金——「王冠裡摻了其他金屬」就是測試結果。
questions.sentenceZh: 兩次水量不一樣，代表王冠不是純金。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They ___ the crown in the bowl first, then they put in the pure gold.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
optionsZh: 放（第三人稱單數現在式）
questions.explanationZh: 整段在說他們「先放了」王冠——put 很特別，說發生過的事還是 put，不會變喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們___先把王冠放進碗裡，然後再放進純金。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king turned to Archimedes and held out his hand with a soft smile.
questions.questionEn: Did the king seem grateful to Archimedes?
questions.explanationZh: 轉向他、伸出手、溫和微笑——這就是感謝的動作，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 國王轉向阿基米德，帶著溫和的微笑伸出了手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Beside the crown they placed a piece of pure gold of the same weight.
questions.question: Why did they need the pure gold piece?
options: comparing the crown against a known sample
melt the crown if it turned out fake
gift it to Archimedes as a reward
swap out the crown for something better
optionsZh: 用已知樣品跟王冠做比較
如果是假的就把王冠熔掉
用更好的東西換掉王冠
questions.explanationZh: 放一塊重量相同的純金——為了「有東西可以跟王冠做比較」，才知道差別在哪。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們在王冠旁邊放了一塊同樣重量的純金。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water levels were different. The truth was now clear.
questions.question: Which best shows the outcome?
questions.explanationZh: 水位不同，真相大白——「謎底揭開了」，那個 🔍 最像這個時刻。
questions.sentenceZh: 水位不同，真相現在清楚了。

storyBeat: 法則傳到今天 — 每個玩水的小孩都像他

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 thank = 謝謝
🔑 science = 科學
🔑 law = 法則
🔑 today = 今天
最後一課，好好記！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The king thanked Archimedes for finding the truth.
questions.explanationZh: 國王謝謝 Archimedes 找到真相——那聲謝謝，值了好幾天沒睡的苦。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The rule from that bath became part of science forever.
questions.question: What happened to the rule from the bath?
options: it was forgotten the next day
only the king kept it safe
it is still used by people today
it was hidden away in secret
questions.explanationZh: 那次洗澡得到的發現，變成了永遠的科學法則——「今天還在用」就是答案，不是只有那個時代用。
questions.sentenceZh: 那次洗澡得出的定律，從此成為科學的一部分，永遠流傳。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Boats, ships, and even small toys still use this rule today.
questions.questionEn: Is Archimedes' rule still used in the world?
questions.explanationZh: 船、玩具水鴨、游泳池……到今天這個規則還在用——當然「今天還在用」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 船、大輪船，甚至小玩具，今天都還用著這個原理。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: We still call it Archimedes' law today.
questions.explanationZh: 我們今天還叫它「Archimedes 法則」——也叫浮力原理。洗澡洗出來的科學！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big idea came from a small thing he saw with care.
questions.question: Where did the big idea come from?
options: a magic spell from an old wizard
a long dream during his noon rest
an old thick book full of numbers
careful watching of a small thing
optionsZh: 一本寫滿數字的厚舊書
questions.explanationZh: 大點子來自仔細觀察一件小事——「仔細觀察一件小事」就是答案。水溢出來這件事，別人都忽略了。
questions.sentenceZh: 偉大的想法，來自他用心看見的一件小事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And every kid who tries an idea in the bath is a little like him.
questions.explanationZh: 每個在浴缸裡試點子的小孩，都有一點像 Archimedes。說不定你也是呢！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A bath, a bowl, a puddle — anywhere can be a tiny science lab.
questions.question: Where can a small science lesson happen?
options: anywhere, even at the kitchen sink
questions.explanationZh: 浴缸、碗、水坑——到處都可以當小小的科學實驗室。「在日常的小地方」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 浴缸、水盆、水窪——任何地方都可以是一個小小的科學實驗室。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All you need are open eyes and a head full of why.
questions.explanationZh: 「張開眼睛，帶著一顆充滿「為什麼」的腦袋。」——這就是奶奶最喜歡說的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the main lesson from Archimedes?
questions.question: What does the story teach?
options: 🏃 run as fast as you can
🍔 eat a big meal every night
questions.explanationZh: 仔細觀察小事 → 發現大道理。這就是故事教我們的事！「仔細觀察小事」是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 從阿基米德的故事，我們學到什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What small thing did you notice today? It might be the start of a big idea...
questions.explanationZh: 你今天有沒有注意到什麼小事？搞不好，那就是一個大發現的種子……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The rule from that bath became part of science forever.
questions.question: What happened to the discovery from the bath?
options: it was lost after he left the palace
only Archimedes kept it to himself
it became a lasting scientific rule
the king stored it away in secret
optionsZh: 他離開宮殿後就失傳了
只有阿基米德自己知道
它變成了永久的科學法則
國王把它藏起來當秘密
questions.explanationZh: 「became part of science forever」——「變成了永久的科學法則」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 那次洗澡得出的定律，永遠成為科學的一部分。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All you need are open eyes and a head full of why.
questions.questionEn: Can anyone discover new things by observing with care?
questions.explanationZh: 「open eyes」和「a head full of why」——任何人只要認真看、充滿好奇，都可以發現新東西，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 你只需要張開眼睛，帶著充滿「為什麼」的腦袋。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 science = 科學
🔑 law = 法則
🔑 today = 今天
🔑 observe = 觀察
最後一節的字！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And every kid who tries an idea in the bath is a little like him.
questions.question: What point does the narrator make here?
options: children should study harder than adults
only scientists can follow his example
baths always lead to great ideas
curious children share a spirit with Archimedes
optionsZh: 孩子應該比大人更努力讀書
只有科學家才能效法他
好奇的孩子和阿基米德有相同的精神
questions.explanationZh: 每個在浴缸裡試點子的小孩——「好奇的孩子和阿基米德有相同的精神」就是這句話的意思。
questions.sentenceZh: 每個在浴缸裡試點子的小孩，都有一點像阿基米德。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Boats, ships, and even small toys ___ this rule today.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 船、輪船、小玩具——好多樣東西一起，說「它們」做的事，動詞不用加 -s，直接用「use」。句子說「today」，是現在還在用喔。
questions.sentenceZh: 船、大輪船，甚至小玩具，今天都___這個原理。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The big idea came from a small thing he saw with care.
questions.questionEn: Was careful observation important to Archimedes' discovery?
questions.explanationZh: 「saw with care」——仔細觀察才有大發現，「仔細觀察很重要」，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 偉大的想法，來自他用心觀察的一件小事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A bath, a bowl, a puddle — anywhere can be a tiny science lab.
questions.question: What lesson does this sentence teach?
options: only big schools have real labs
science happens in ordinary everyday places
water is the only tool for science
optionsZh: 只有大學才有真正的實驗室
科學就發生在日常的普通地方
實驗室必須有昂貴的設備
questions.explanationZh: 浴缸、水盆、水坑——「科學就發生在日常的普通地方」就是這句話要教的道理。
questions.sentenceZh: 浴缸、水盆、水坑——任何地方都可以是小小的科學實驗室。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What small thing did you notice today? It might be the start of a big idea.
questions.question: What quality did Archimedes have?
options: 💰 a love of gold and money
🔭 a sharp eye for small details
questions.explanationZh: 注意到水溢出這件小事——「對小細節敏銳的眼力」就是他最大的本事！那個 🔭 最像他。
questions.sentenceZh: 你今天注意到什麼小事了嗎？也許那是一個大點子的起點。
